testcase.name: testCounterRemovedAfterException
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.274 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.274 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 5 20:25:03.274 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_remove 20:25:03.274 [main] ERROR tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Circuit breaker opened for session session_remove after 5 iterations (threshold: 5)

testcase.name: testSetThresholdWithNegativeValue
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.274 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testConstructorWithDefaultThreshold
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.274 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testGetCurrentCount
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.275 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.275 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_count

testcase.name: testCheckAndIncrementThrowsOnThreshold
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.275 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.275 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 5 20:25:03.275 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_threshold 20:25:03.275 [main] ERROR tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Circuit breaker opened for session session_threshold after 5 iterations (threshold: 5)

testcase.name: testSetThresholdWithZero
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.275 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testCheckAndIncrement19TimesNoException
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.275 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.275 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_19 20:25:03.275 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_19 iteration count: 5 20:25:03.275 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_19 iteration count: 10 20:25:03.275 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_19 iteration count: 15

testcase.name: testConstructorWithZeroThreshold
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.276 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testCircuitBreakerOpenExceptionContent
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.276 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.276 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 3 20:25:03.276 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_exception 20:25:03.276 [main] ERROR tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Circuit breaker opened for session session_exception after 3 iterations (threshold: 3)

testcase.name: testResetNonExistentSession
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.276 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.276 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Attempted to reset non-existent counter for session: nonexistent

testcase.name: testConstructorWithNegativeThreshold
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.276 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testConstructorWithCustomThreshold
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 15

testcase.name: testResetWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testSetThreshold
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Circuit breaker threshold updated from 20 to 10

testcase.name: testResetWithEmptySessionId
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testClearAll
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session1 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session2 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session3 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Cleared all circuit breaker counters (was 3)

testcase.name: testResetClearsCounter
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_reset 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_reset iteration count: 5 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_reset iteration count: 10 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Reset circuit breaker counter for session: session_reset (was at 10) 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_reset 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_reset iteration count: 5 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_reset iteration count: 10 20:25:03.278 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_reset iteration count: 15

testcase.name: testGetCurrentCountForNonExistentSession
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testGetCurrentCountWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testCheckAndIncrement20TimesThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.278 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.279 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_20 20:25:03.279 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_20 iteration count: 5 20:25:03.279 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_20 iteration count: 10 20:25:03.279 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_20 iteration count: 15 20:25:03.279 [main] ERROR tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Circuit breaker opened for session session_20 after 20 iterations (threshold: 20)

testcase.name: testCheckAndIncrementWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.279 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20

testcase.name: testCheckAndIncrementWithEmptySessionId

testcase.name: testMultipleSessionsIndependentCounters
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.279 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20 20:25:03.280 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_1 20:25:03.280 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_1 iteration count: 5 20:25:03.280 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_1 iteration count: 10 20:25:03.280 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Created new counter for session: session_2 20:25:03.280 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- Session session_2 iteration count: 5

testcase.name: testGetCurrentCountWithEmptySessionId
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.280 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.safeguard.impl.CircuitBreakerImpl -- CircuitBreaker initialized with threshold: 20
